tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Clear water jerkbait: if water is clear, always have one ready. Fish come up hard from 17-18ft to strike. Use Deep 300 Series for deep clear water. Shallower over grass, switch to shallow-running version. Cast, pop forward, let rod tip fall back toward bait to maintain slack — that gives the perfect erratic side-to-side action. Quick sequences of 2-3 jerks/twitches.'
